title: Overlay incomplete layer cause panic runtime error invalid memory
body:
I'm getting the same errors lately with Quadlets on Fedora CoreOS (41.20241122.3.0) using overlay on xfs. It first happened when I updated multiple containers with the `podman auto-update` command. It completely broke podman, and I had to nuke the storage location manually as even the `podman system reset` was also having this error. Then afterwards I couldn't spin up all the Quadlets simultaneously, as the error came back, most like due to podman trying to download multiple images & layers at the same time? 

The only workaround I found was to spin up the Quadlets one by one by moving one Quadlet container file to the appropriate directory at a time and calling `systemctl --user daemon-reload; systemctl --user start servicename`, wait till it was successfully running & then repeat for every other service.

>  _Originally posted by @haleksandre in [#16882](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/16882#issuecomment-2573179218)_
